prompt: Create a clean kawaii anime chibi illustration on a white background featuring a young male AI engineer crouching in the center, wearing a blue blazer, black shirt, black pants, and black sneakers, with short fluffy black hair, one small black earring, and a large opaque beige square censor block covering the entire face from forehead to chin. The pose is relaxed and thoughtful: one hand near the mouth, the other hand resting near the knee, body squatting low. Surround him with exactly 8 cute AI and technology elements: 1 green rounded-square tile with a white GPT-style knot logo on the left, 1 light-blue rounded-square chatbot icon below it, 1 open laptop at bottom left with a smiling face on the screen, 1 pale blue molecular network diagram at upper left, 1 dark floating analytics dashboard at upper right with connected nodes, 1 purple rounded-square creative palette icon at mid-right, 1 tiny white round robot mascot at bottom right with blue glowing eyes, and 1 small pale blue wireframe cube near the robot. Add scattered decorative accents: yellow sparkles, blue motion lines, small pastel dots, and tiny circles. Use polished digital art, soft shading, crisp linework, glossy icon highlights, pastel blue and lavender accents, centered composition, no text, no watermark, friendly modern AI mascot aesthetic.
